name: Identity & Access Management
description: Active Directory, Entra ID, LDAP, MFA, and PAM — authentication failures, privilege escalation, and identity governance.
quickTip: Enable Windows Security Event Log collection from DCs with Splunk_TA_windows for immediate AD visibility.

subcategories.name: Active Directory / Entra ID
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Windows (`Splunk_TA_windows`), Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Cloud Services (`Splunk_TA_microsoft-cloudservices`) for Entra ID.

subcategories.name: LDAP Directories
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Syslog inputs, custom scripted inputs for LDAP server stats.

subcategories.name: Identity Providers (IdP) & SSO
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for Okta (`Splunk_TA_okta`), Duo TA, custom API inputs for other IdPs.

subcategories.name: Privileged Access Management (PAM)
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Vendor-specific TAs — CyberArk TA (`TA-CyberArk`), BeyondTrust TA, Delinea (Thycotic) TA.

subcategories.name: Cloud Identity Providers — Okta & Duo
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for Okta (`Splunk_TA_okta`), Cisco Duo TA (Splunk Add-on for Cisco Duo / Duo Authentication Proxy logs), optional Splunk Connect for Cisco Security Cloud for unified Duo telemetry.

subcategories.name: Endpoint & Mobile Device Management
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Cisco Meraki Systems Manager, MDM API integrations
